qa_pairs.question: What is the primary purpose of the document detailing job scheduling policy changes?
qa_pairs.answer: The document records changes to job scheduling policies that might affect how `sbatch`, `salloc`, and `srun` commands behave.

qa_pairs.question: When were the RAC 2026 accounts activated for the Fir and Nibi clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: RAC 2026 accounts were activated for the Fir and Nibi clusters on 2026-04-06.

qa_pairs.question: What were the activation dates for RAC 2026 accounts on the Narval and Rorqual clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: RAC 2026 accounts were activated on the Narval and Rorqual clusters on 2026-04-07.

qa_pairs.question: When did sub-allocations become available for the Fir and Nibi clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: Sub-allocations became available for the Fir and Nibi clusters on 2026-04-06.

qa_pairs.question: What date were sub-allocations made available for the Narval and Rorqual clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: Sub-allocations were made available for the Narval and Rorqual clusters on 2026-04-07.

qa_pairs.question: Were there any updates to CPU job policies reported as of May 1, 2026?
qa_pairs.answer: No, there were no updates to CPU job policies reported as of May 1, 2026.

qa_pairs.question: What is a new requirement for all GPU requests on Alliance clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: All GPU requests must specify a GPU model or an instance model.

qa_pairs.question: When did the requirement to specify a GPU model or instance model come into effect for the Fir and Nibi clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: This requirement came into effect for the Fir and Nibi clusters on 2026-04-06.

qa_pairs.question: What is the status of the GPU model specification requirement for the Narval cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: The requirement to specify a GPU model or instance model for the Narval cluster is listed as 'coming soon'.

qa_pairs.question: On what date was the policy requiring specification of a GPU model or instance model implemented on the Rorqual cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: This policy was implemented on the Rorqual cluster on 2026-04-17.

qa_pairs.question: What is the limit on Multi-Instance GPU (MIG) instances that can be requested at one time?
qa_pairs.answer: Only one Multi-Instance GPU (MIG) instance may be requested at a time.

qa_pairs.question: When did the policy limiting MIG instance requests to one at a time become active on the Fir and Nibi clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: This policy became active on the Fir and Nibi clusters on 2026-04-06.

qa_pairs.question: What is the current status of the 'one MIG instance per request' policy for the Narval cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: The 'one MIG instance per request' policy for the Narval cluster is currently 'coming soon'.

qa_pairs.question: When was the 'one MIG instance per request' policy implemented on the Rorqual cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: This policy was implemented on the Rorqual cluster on 2026-04-17.
